title: Parent/Child Activity Groups * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Parent/Child Activity Groups * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a weekly playgroup for parents and their children. Chxi San means "New Day" in Chinook Wawa. Provides culturally focused, child-centered, and developmentally appropriate play in a structured environment. Provides culturally appropriate snacks during playgroup. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Parents and their children 6 weeks-5 years. Primarily serves self-identified Native Americans. Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 282-2599 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP
